name: spec-prosecutor
description: PRD review plugin for engineers before implementation starts.

interface.shortDescription: Audit one Markdown PRD before coding starts.
interface.longDescription: Reviews one explicitly provided Markdown PRD from an engineer's perspective and returns a structured prosecutor-style implementation-readiness report.
defaultPrompt: Review this PRD and tell me if engineering can start coding safely.
Run Spec Prosecutor on this Markdown PRD.
Audit this requirement doc for ambiguity and missing implementation detail.
